key_developments.source: National Herald India / IGNCA Conference Sep 2025
key_developments.finding: Major international conference on Indus script. TN CM offered  prize. Dholavira signboard is 26 characters (longest). Rakhigarhi 2023 seal with numerical notations.
key_developments.impact: HIGH — confirms ongoing active research, new data sources

key_developments.finding: Claims complete Sanskrit cryptanalytic decipherment of 500+ inscriptions using Shannon criteria. Controversial, not peer-reviewed.
key_developments.impact: MEDIUM — worth testing their sign→sound mappings against our corpus stats

key_developments.finding: Constraint-based structural analysis of 1670 seals. Found 4 statistically robust core-title pairs at p<0.001. 99.76% isolation rate (one clause, one identity per seal).
key_developments.impact: HIGH — independent confirmation of our structural findings

key_developments.finding: Markov Chain Language Models for decoding missing/unclear signs and identifying anomalous West Asian texts.
key_developments.impact: MEDIUM — complementary approach to our MCMC decoder

key_developments.finding: Comprehensive review confirming Dravidian as strongest mainstream candidate. Notes semasiographic/administrative models gaining traction.
key_developments.impact: HIGH — independent scholarly consensus supports our framework

key_developments.finding: Computational analysis of 9 copper plates finds structured theological discourse. Logographic-ideographic system with Proto-Elamite parallels.
key_developments.impact: LOW — very specific corpus subset, unreviewed

key_developments.finding: 150 new inscriptions from Dholavira. Extensive metalwork artifacts. Signboard reading attempted.
key_developments.impact: HIGH — 150 additional inscriptions not yet in our ICIT corpus

longest_known_inscription.note: Also seal M-314 from Mohenjo-daro has longest seal inscription (~17 signs)
